'''鈭歾h-v-zh''' ('''zhavazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immiserate|immiserate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-v-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immiserate|immiserate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-v-zh
|-
! Lemma
| zhavazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhavazhithi|zhavazhithi]] || [[word:zhavazhiji|zhavazhiji]] || [[word:zhavazhishi|zhavazhishi]] || [[word:zhavazhi|zhavazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhavazhuthuth|zhavazhuthuth]] || [[word:zhavazhujuj|zhavazhujuj]] || [[word:zhavazhushush|zhavazhushush]] || [[word:zhavazh|zhavazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhavazhuthu|zhavazhuthu]] || [[word:zhavazhuju|zhavazhuju]] || [[word:zhavazhushu|zhavazhushu]] || [[word:zhavazhu|zhavazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhavazhufuth|zhavazhufuth]] || [[word:zhavazhufuj|zhavazhufuj]] || [[word:zhavazhufush|zhavazhufush]] || [[word:zhavazhuf|zhavazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhavazhethe|zhavazhethe]] || [[word:zhavazheje|zhavazheje]] || [[word:zhavazheshe|zhavazheshe]] || [[word:zhavazhe|zhavazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhavazhothoth|zhavazhothoth]] || [[word:zhavazhojoj|zhavazhojoj]] || [[word:zhavazhoshosh|zhavazhoshosh]] || [[word:zhavazh|zhavazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhavazhotho|zhavazhotho]] || [[word:zhavazhojo|zhavazhojo]] || [[word:zhavazhosho|zhavazhosho]] || [[word:zhavazho|zhavazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhavazhofoth|zhavazhofoth]] || [[word:zhavazhofoj|zhavazhofoj]] || [[word:zhavazhofosh|zhavazhofosh]] || [[word:zhavazhof|zhavazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhavazh忙th忙|zhavazh忙th忙]] || [[word:zhavazh忙j忙|zhavazh忙j忙]] || [[word:zhavazh忙sh忙|zhavazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:zhavazh忙|zhavazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhavazhathath|zhavazhathath]] || [[word:zhavazhajaj|zhavazhajaj]] || [[word:zhavazhashash|zhavazhashash]] || [[word:zhavazh|zhavazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhavazhatha|zhavazhatha]] || [[word:zhavazhaja|zhavazhaja]] || [[word:zhavazhasha|zhavazhasha]] || [[word:zhavazha|zhavazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhavazhafath|zhavazhafath]] || [[word:zhavazhafaj|zhavazhafaj]] || [[word:zhavazhafash|zhavazhafash]] || [[word:zhavazhaf|zhavazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zhavazhasha|zhavazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozhavazhasha|gozhavazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizhavazhasha|gokizhavazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhavazhn眉sha|zhavazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozhavazhnkn眉sha|gozhavazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizhavazhn眉sha|gokizhavazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhavazhsh毛sha|zhavazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhavazhnksh毛sha|gozhavazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhavazhsh毛sha|gokizhavazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhavazhrosha|zhavazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhavazhnkrosha|gozhavazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhavazhrosha|gokizhavazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhavazhmusha|zhavazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhavazhnkmusha|gozhavazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhavazhmusha|gokizhavazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zhavazhsherasha|zhavazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozhavazhnksherasha|gozhavazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizhavazhsherasha|gokizhavazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zhavazhngasha|zhavazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozhavazhnkngasha|gozhavazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizhavazhngasha|gokizhavazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhavazhyasha|zhavazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhavazhnkyasha|gozhavazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizhavazhyasha|gokizhavazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zhavazhyamasha|zhavazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozhavazhnkyamasha|gozhavazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizhavazhyamasha|gokizhavazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhavazhn眉sh毛sha|zhavazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhavazhnkn眉sh毛sha|gozhavazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhavazhn眉sh毛sha|gokizhavazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhavazhn眉rosha|zhavazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhavazhnkn眉rosha|gozhavazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhavazhn眉rosha|gokizhavazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhavazhn眉musha|zhavazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhavazhnkn眉musha|gozhavazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhavazhn眉musha|gokizhavazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhavazhsh毛n眉sha|zhavazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhavazhnksh毛n眉sha|gozhavazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhavazhsh毛n眉sha|gokizhavazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhavazhsh毛rosha|zhavazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhavazhnksh毛rosha|gozhavazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhavazhsh毛rosha|gokizhavazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhavazhsh毛musha|zhavazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhavazhnksh毛musha|gozhavazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhavazhsh毛musha|gokizhavazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhavazhron眉sha|zhavazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhavazhnkron眉sha|gozhavazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhavazhron眉sha|gokizhavazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhavazhrosh毛sha|zhavazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhavazhnkrosh毛sha|gozhavazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhavazhrosh毛sha|gokizhavazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhavazhromusha|zhavazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhavazhnkromusha|gozhavazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhavazhromusha|gokizhavazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhavazhmun眉sha|zhavazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhavazhnkmun眉sha|gozhavazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhavazhmun眉sha|gokizhavazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhavazhmush毛sha|zhavazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhavazhnkmush毛sha|gozhavazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhavazhmush毛sha|gokizhavazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhavazhmurosha|zhavazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhavazhnkmurosha|gozhavazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhavazhmurosha|gokizhavazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zhavazh|zhavazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zh忙v忙zh|zh忙v忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozhavazh|hozhavazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozh忙v忙zh|hozh忙v忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhavazh|hohozhavazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozh忙v忙zh|hohozh忙v忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zhavazh|n眉zhavazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉zh忙v忙zh|n眉zh忙v忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zhavazh|n眉n眉zhavazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zh忙v忙zh|n眉n眉zh忙v忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zhavazh|n茂zhavazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂zh忙v忙zh|n茂zh忙v忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zhavazh|n茂n茂zhavazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zh忙v忙zh|n茂n茂zh忙v忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzhavazh|luzhavazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzh忙v忙zh|luzh忙v忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhavazh|luluzhavazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzh忙v忙zh|luluzh忙v忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizhavazh|lizhavazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizh忙v忙zh|lizh忙v忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhavazh|lilizhavazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizh忙v忙zh|lilizh忙v忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozhavazh|kozhavazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozh忙v忙zh|kozh忙v忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhavazh|kokozhavazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozh忙v忙zh|kokozh忙v忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezhavazh|kezhavazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezh忙v忙zh|kezh忙v忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhavazh|kekezhavazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezh忙v忙zh|kekezh忙v忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
